rules.then: Sorry about that! My brain is still small. Try asking me to search the web for things I don't know yet.
Sorry! I didn't have that in my brain. Try asking me to search for it.
I can chat, search the web (with your permission), look at drawings, and answer terminal questions. What do you need?
Hit the ✏️ button to open the drawing pad!
Sure! What do you want me to search for?
I can chat, search the web, look at drawings, answer terminal/coding questions, and connect to MCP servers. I'm growing!
